hero.subtitle: A curated hub for Delta Force players — streamers, community servers, competitive tools, and game data. Built by a player, for players.

streamer_showcase.title: Streamer Showcase
streamer_showcase.desc: Curated list of Delta Force streamers with tags, language filters, and live status. Find content that matches your vibe.

community_reference.title: Community Reference
community_reference.desc: Discord and TeamSpeak servers for the Delta Force community. Find your region, your playstyle, your people.

competitive_hub.title: Competitive Hub
competitive_hub.desc: Scrim client setup guides, competitive ruleset updates, and stat tracking for the Delta Force competitive scene.

data_hub.title: Data Hub
data_hub.desc: Game data, economy tracking, weapon stats and builds for Delta Force. Numbers for people who care about numbers.

about.label: Gaming Profile
about.bio: Player with a focus on competitive Delta Force. I build and maintain resources for the Delta Force community — streamers, servers, guides, and data tools. This site is the hub for all of it.
about.streamer_showcase_desc: Curated Delta Force streamer directory with filters and live status.
about.community_reference_desc: List of Delta Force Discord and TeamSpeak servers.
about.competitive_hub_desc: Scrim guides, rulesets, and stats tracking for competitive play.
about.data_hub_desc: Economy tracking, weapon stats, and game data tools.

streamers.label: Curated List
streamers.title: Delta Force Streamers
streamers.intro: Hand-picked streamers with descriptions to help you find your match. Live status refreshes on page load.

community.label: Community Reference
community.title: Community Servers
community.intro: Discord and TeamSpeak servers for Delta Force players. Find your region, your playstyle, your people.
